S.FORM: Andrew Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1945, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 7, Andrew Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: an*rew an*ers~…ïon s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj * nqu taj *, an*rew an*ers~…ïon, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
S.FORM: Andrew Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1945, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 7, Andrew Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: an*rew an*ers~…ïon s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj * nqu taj *, an*rew an*ers~…ïon, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
